Current helper coverage is structural only for the canonical resinoid identity.
Prefer a supplier SDS, TDS, or manufacturer spec before promoting CAS or INCI.
Keep the vendor-style resinoid distinct from Peru balsam oil.
Leave chemistry blank unless a trusted document clearly supports the canonical resinoid identity.
Current canonical seed is derived from the live diluted-stock row only.
Do not promote IFRA linkage without a trusted standard source.
Current canonical seed is structural/source-seeded only.
Prefer a trusted supplier or manufacturer document before promoting chemistry.
CAS and INCI are already covered conservatively through the shared Ylang oil family treatment.
The next safe evidence gap is note-role and stronger identity description for the Fine grade.
Keep fractional grade identity distinct from Extra, Complete, and III.
Do not guess note-role or IFRA material linkage from family similarity alone.
CAS and INCI already inherit from the shared Ylang oil family coverage.
A trusted supplier spec or PDF is still needed before promoting deeper chemistry or IFRA hints.
